creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Seyed Pouria Mousavizadeh Tehrani from comment #1)

Hi,

It suffices to link the changelog.  You do not need to repeat it in a comment.
It suffices to indicate that you tested the port and on what platforms and OS versions.  There is no need to attach Poudriere logs unless there is something you want to point out in them.

@Andreas Heil will remove your maintainership as per your request.
